    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable String
    MatchboxEngineSupport.getFhirCorePackage(@NonNull CliContext cliContext)
    Returns the FHIR core package for the specified FHIR version in the cliContext, or null if the FHIR version is not supported.
    MatchboxEngine
    MatchboxEngineSupport.getMatchboxEngine(@Nullable String canonical, @Nullable CliContext cliContext, boolean create, boolean reload)
    Returns a Matchbox engine for the specified canonical with cliClontext parameters.
    MatchboxEngine
    MatchboxEngineSupport.getMatchboxEngineNotSynchronized(@Nullable String canonical, @Nullable CliContext cliRequestedContext, boolean create, boolean reload)
    Returns a Matchbox engine for the specified canonical with cliClontext parameters.
